text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(Dirt or turf... For now, I can still just ride out my
luck. But...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(I'll have to make a choice eventually. I wonder
how everyone else decided. Did they just choose
based on their aptitude?)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All right! In times like these, the best thing to do
is ask directly! ☆

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh? Why do the two of us run on turf?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Well, we know exactly why! Don't we, Dia?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
We promised we'd run in the Classic Triple Crown
and the Arima Kinen together!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We sure did. And on top of that... winning one of
the classics is my whole life's purpose.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I see... A promise between friends and a "whole
life's purpose." It makes sense you'd pick turf,
then.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: (Okay, now for part two—I need to ask other racers why they run on dirt...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(I need to ask why they decided on a
specialization that doesn't get as much of the
spotlight. And the person I want to ask the most
is...)

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: What? Why do I run on dirt?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yeah. What made you decide to be a dirt racer?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Obviously, it's because I run best on dirt.
Although, honestly, there is another reason...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I thought running on dirt would be the best way
to promote Tomakomai.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: How would it promote your hometown?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I come from one of the greatest port cities in all
of northern Japan. But...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
It's not as famous as Sapporo or Hakodate, right?
It's like it supports Hokkaido from behind the
scenes.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
There's something about dirt races that reminds
me of that reliable, hardworking spirit.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Even if I don't stand out now, if I keep doing my
best, someday people will notice and I can be
famous!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
That's what made me choose dirt races. They
represent the way I live my life!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Dirt's how you live your life, huh...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So you chose it based on your aptitude and how
you feel it relates back to your hometown.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Dirt represents my desire to really cherish
Tomakomai!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I think I get it. So if I consider my aptitude and
feelings...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Basically, I should be thinking about what I need
to do to spread feng shui and help people.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Ngh. Rickey... Feng shui again? Really?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
This is real talk, you know? You should forget
about feng shui while you figure this stuff out.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: The decision you make now could influence your whole future, Rickey. What do you want to do?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Looks like you're still figuring it out. ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But that's totally normal. ♪ Deciding whether to
go with dirt or turf races is a huge deal.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Oh! Falco!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(Falco, also known as Smart Falcon... She's an
older racer who's done amazing things on the
dirt.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(She's also an Umamusume idol—or
"Umadol"—and Tarumae really looks up to her.)

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, I had a pretty tough
time choosing too. I was like, "Turf? Dirt? Which
one's better?" ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Turf really is the shining star of the Japanese
racing world, and I was stuck on that for ages.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Um! Then what made you choose dirt in the end?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I'm really interested to know how you decided!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Well, part of it was definitely that I run
better on dirt, but...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I think it was my dream that gave me the final
push.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Your dream?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah! My dream is...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: To be the top Umadol! I want to stand right on center stage and shine the brightest!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Racers who can shine with all their might while
covered in dirt are just as precious as turf runners.
And I want to make my dream come true on that
same dirt.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's why I went with dirt! You know, I think your
dream might be what really matters.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: My dream, huh... My aptitude... and my dream...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
That was amazing, Falco. You put all my thoughts
into such nice words.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Well, I hope I helped a bit. Give it a think,
Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I will!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So that's what happened, Trainer. And it made me
think...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I should probably get my ducks in a row before I
take on my next goal race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey's dream sounds simple enough,
but she's right—it would be good for her to
organize her ambitions.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
My dream, or in other words, my ultimate goal, is
to make everyone happy through feng shui.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
In the same way Falco can shine on the dirt track,
I can convey the power of feng shui here. No, in
fact...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: It would be easier to convey its power on the dirt. So even though it'll take time, I think it'd be better to use the dirt to help the ideas really sink in.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. That should work... That way will bring me
closer to my dream. But still...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I'm missing something important. Like
there's some place the dragon veins aren't
connecting...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After our talk, I can see that while Copano Rickey
has the general idea pinned down, she's still not
fully satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Something's holding me back. But what?
There has to be a key somewhere!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thinking will only get us so far...
choice_data_list:
The Fukuryu Stakes will help us figure it out,
right?

The Fukuryu Stakes will help us figure it out,
right?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, good point... The whole reason I decided to
run in an open dirt race was to help me decide.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Trainer. I guess I was overthinking it.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All right, so my dream is what matters. I know that
much! Next up...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to try asking Fukuryu! I wonder what
answers I'll get from the dragon lurking in the
dirt?
